envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key, from simmer.markets/dashboard (SDK tab). Free tier works for dry-run.

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Your Polymarket wallet private key (the deposit-wallet owner key, or a plain EOA key) for self-custody combo placement. Not needed in dry-run.

tunables.label: Stake (USDC) - the maximum you can lose
